---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with instrument control or a measurement script
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## Instrument(s) involved
List the instrument(s) and their VISA addresses (e.g. Keithley 2110 @ USB0::...).

## To reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behaviour:
1. Script or function called
2. Parameters used
3. Error or unexpected output observed

## Expected behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Error output
```
Paste the full traceback here
```

## Environment
- OS: (e.g. Windows 11)
- Python version: (e.g. 3.11)
- VISA backend: (e.g. NI-VISA 2024, pyvisa-py)
- Arceus version / commit:
